situation: The company's advertising campaign is not resonating with the target audience during a war.

options.action: adjust advertising strategy to be more sensitive and relevant
options.consequence: improved reputation and engagement with target audience
reputational damage and loss of engagement with target audience

common_rookie_mistake: failing to adjust advertising strategy to the current situation
consequence_if_wrong: reputational damage and loss of engagement with target audience
rationale: adjusting the advertising strategy to be more sensitive and relevant to the current situation will help to improve reputation and engagement with the target audience

situation: The company's advertising campaign has caused a backlash from the target audience.
common_rookie_mistake: defending the advertising strategy instead of apologizing and adjusting
rationale: apologizing and adjusting the advertising strategy will help to mitigate reputational damage and improve engagement with the target audience
